ogTitle: Sylvania Waters vs Tabbil Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sylvania Waters and Tabbil Creek.
heading: Sylvania Waters vs Tabbil Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sylvania Waters, New South Wales and Tabbil Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tabbil Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Sylvania Waters (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sylvania Waters or Tabbil Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sylvania Waters has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Tabbil Creek scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sylvania Waters scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Tabbil Creek scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sylvania Waters or Tabbil Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tabbil Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
